uplink.description: 0x49 TIC data (three-phase) — BASE energy, IINST1/2/3 currents, IMAX1/2/3, PMAX active power, PAPP apparent
uplink._note: Upstream codec example (tic-cbe-linky-tri-codec.yaml). expected.data derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js: BASE 0x1234=4660 Wh, IINST1 0x2B=43 A, IINST2 0x2C=44, IINST3 0x2D=45, IMAX1/2/3 17/18/19 A, PMAX 0x20=32 W, PAPP 0x10=16 VA. status byte 0x40 -> frameCounter 2, all flags false. Maps metering.energy.total/power.current/power.active/power.apparent; phases 2-3 + IMAX as extras.

uplink.description: 0x49 TIC data — second sample with low-battery and config flags set
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds three-phase frame, cross-checked against reference/upstream-codec.js. BASE 0x000186A0=100000 Wh, IINST1/2/3 12/10/8 A, IMAX1/2/3 30/28/25 A, PMAX 0x0BB8=3000 W, PAPP 0x09C4=2500 VA. status 0x63 -> frameCounter 3, lowBattery+configurationDone true.

uplink.description: 0x49 TIC data with BASE register absent (sentinel 0x80000000) — emits warning, still satisfies power-meter via current/active

warnings: no cumulative energy index on the TIC bus (BASE absent)

uplink._note: BASE set to the upstream not-found sentinel 0x80000000 so no metering.energy.total is emitted; warning declared. IINST1 15 A -> power.current, PMAX 0x40=64 W -> power.active, PAPP 0x32=50 VA. Confirmed reg32 returns null on sentinel.
Frame code 0x99 is not one of the normalized Adeunis TIC frames (0x10/0x20/0x30/0x49/0x4a), so decodeUplinkCore returns an error.
